summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. All 32 tests passed (100% success rate). The modular router architecture is working correctly after the refactoring from monolithic server.py to routes/ package.

minor.issue: Warning about bcrypt version attribute - 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__'. This is a non-blocking warning from passlib library.

auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/register: PASS - Creates new user with session token
auth_endpoints.GET /api/auth/me: PASS - Returns current user profile with valid token

categories_endpoint.GET /api/categories: PASS - Returns 8 root categories with subcategories

business_endpoints.GET /api/businesses/my: PASS - Returns user's business or null

artist_endpoints.GET /api/artists/my: PASS - Returns user's artist profile or null

feed_endpoint.GET /api/feed/home: PASS - Returns posts, stories, events, businesses

profile_endpoints.GET /api/users/{id}/public: PASS - Returns public profile with posts/stories

critical_code_review_comments: Modular architecture properly implemented - each route module in routes/ package
API router properly aggregates all sub-routers with /api prefix
Database and config properly imported from separate modules
All endpoints respond correctly after refactoring
test_credentials: Multiple unique test users created per test class (auto-generated emails)
seed_data_creation: Test users and test entities (posts, stories) created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring is complete and verified. All routes are properly connected and working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_routes.py can be used for regression testing. The bcrypt warning is a non-blocking issue from passlib library (bcrypt module attribute changed in newer versions).
